scope: Annual financial statements audit for FY2024
executiveSummary: Unqualified audit opinion issued. No material misstatements found.

findings.title: Fixed Asset Register Reconciliation
findings.description: Minor discrepancies found in fixed asset register for mining equipment.
findings.actionTaken: Fixed asset register reconciled and discrepancies corrected.

scope: Annual financial statements audit for FY2024
executiveSummary: Qualified audit opinion due to revenue recognition issues and going concern uncertainty.

findings.title: Revenue Recognition — Unbilled Revenue
findings.description: ZESCO has not consistently applied IFRS 15 for unbilled revenue recognition.
findings.recommendation: Implement IFRS 15 compliant revenue recognition policy.
findings.actionTaken: IFRS 15 policy drafted. Implementation in progress.

findings.title: Debt Covenant Compliance
findings.description: ZESCO is in breach of two financial covenants on its USD 500M sovereign-guaranteed loan.
findings.recommendation: Engage lenders immediately to obtain covenant waiver.
findings.managementResponse: Waiver negotiations in progress with Ministry of Finance support.

scope: Annual financial statements audit for FY2024
executiveSummary: Unqualified audit opinion. Strong capital adequacy and liquidity position.

findings.title: Loan Loss Provisioning — SME Portfolio
findings.description: Loan loss provisions for SME portfolio may be understated given rising NPL trends.
findings.recommendation: Review and strengthen loan loss provisioning methodology.

executiveSummary: Several procurement process weaknesses identified. No fraud detected.

findings.title: Tender Evaluation Documentation
findings.description: Tender evaluation records incomplete for 3 contracts above ZMW 50M threshold.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all tender evaluations are fully documented per procurement policy.
findings.managementResponse: Agreed. Procurement team retrained on documentation requirements.
findings.actionTaken: Documentation completed and filed. Training conducted.
